name: EcoVadis Supply Chain Sustainability Assessment REST API
what_it_does: EcoVadis supply chain sustainability assessment REST API for procurement teams, large enterprises, and sustainability managers to automate supplier ESG assessments, monitor supply chain sustainability performance, manage scorecards, and access supplier risk intelligence — enabling automated sustainable procurement workflows and supply chain transparency through EcoVadis's collaborative supplier sustainability platform covering 120,000+ companies in 200+ countries. Enables AI agents to manage supplier assessment for ESG scorecard request and monitoring automation, handle scorecard access for supplier sustainability performance retrieval automation, access company search for supplier discovery and matching automation, retrieve assessment status for supplier evaluation progress tracking automation, manage badge sharing for EcoVadis certification verification automation, handle corrective action for supplier improvement plan automation, access benchmarking for supplier industry comparison automation, retrieve category risk for supply chain ESG risk intelligence automation, manage portfolio for multi-supplier ESG analytics automation, and integrate EcoVadis with procurement platforms, ERP, and supply chain management systems for sustainable supply chain automation.
use_cases: Automating supplier ESG assessment requests for corporate sustainable procurement program automation agents
Monitoring supplier sustainability scorecard changes for supply chain risk management automation agents
Verifying EcoVadis certification status for sustainable procurement qualification automation agents
Analyzing supply chain Scope 3 emissions for corporate carbon footprint reporting automation agents
not_for: Financial ESG ratings (EcoVadis is supply chain sustainability, not investment ESG ratings)
Consumer product sustainability claims (EcoVadis is B2B supplier assessments, not consumer labeling)
Environmental regulatory compliance (EcoVadis is sustainability assessments, not regulatory compliance management)
best_when: A large enterprise, procurement team, or sustainability manager wanting AI agents to automate supplier ESG assessments, monitor supply chain sustainability scorecards, and manage sustainable procurement through EcoVadis's supply chain sustainability platform serving 120,000+ companies.
avoid_when: SUPPLIER PARTICIPATION IS VOLUNTARY: EcoVadis assessments require supplier cooperation and completion; automated instant assessment assumption creates pending_supplier_completion as suppliers must actively complete questionnaire; automated must implement supplier outreach and reminder workflow. ASSESSMENT TAKES WEEKS: EcoVadis assessment review process takes several weeks; automated rapid assessment assumption creates pending_review delay; automated must design workflows with multi-week assessment timeline. ONE SCORECARD PER COMPANY: EcoVadis provides one sustainability scorecard per company (not per buyer relationship); automated buyer-specific scorecard assumption creates same_scorecard_for_all; automated must understand EcoVadis's shared assessment model. API ACCESS REQUIRES ENTERPRISE: EcoVadis API is available for enterprise procurement platforms; automated self-service API access assumption creates enterprise_agreement_required; automated must establish EcoVadis enterprise partnership for API access.

auth.notes: EcoVadis uses OAuth2 for supply chain sustainability REST API. REST API with JSON. Paris, France HQ. Founded 2007 by Pierre-François Thaler and Frédéric Trinel. Products: Supplier assessments, scorecards, risk intelligence, analytics, corrective actions, certification badges. SDKs: None public. 120,000+ companies assessed. 200+ countries. Backed by General Atlantic, CVC Capital, Index Ventures. Used by 800+ enterprise buyers including L'Oréal, Johnson & Johnson, Nestlé.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo access for enterprise evaluation; production requires enterprise buyer agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by supplier volume; module-based pricing; enterprise custom contracts
pricing.notes: Paris FR. General Atlantic/CVC. Annual subscription. 120,000+ assessed companies. Enterprise buyers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; assessment and scorecard APIs throttled per enterprise tier

known_agent_gotchas: ASSESSMENT LIFECYCLE IS WEEKS-LONG: EcoVadis assessment process (request → supplier completion → review → scorecard) takes 4-8 weeks; automated quick-turnaround assumption creates extended pending state; automated must design asynchronous workflow with webhook notifications for assessment status changes

SUPPLIER MATCHING IS CRITICAL: EcoVadis matching uses company name, country, and other identifiers to avoid duplicate assessments; automated new-assessment-for-known-supplier assumption creates duplicate_company for already-assessed suppliers; automated must check existing assessments before requesting new assessment

SCORECARD SHARING MODEL: EcoVadis uses shared scorecards — one company can share its scorecard with multiple buyers; automated buyer-exclusive-assessment assumption misunderstands EcoVadis model; automated must understand shared scorecard model and implement proper consent flow

CORRECTIVE ACTIONS REQUIRE FOLLOW-UP: EcoVadis corrective action plans require supplier commitment and progress tracking; automated one-time-assessment assumption creates no corrective action follow-up; automated must implement corrective action monitoring workflow

CATEGORY RISK IS BASED ON INDUSTRY AND COUNTRY: EcoVadis risk intelligence uses commodity/country risk matrices; automated company-specific-risk assumption creates over/under-estimation from inadequate risk context; automated must include industry category and country context for accurate risk assessment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Supply chain sustainability. GDPR, CSRD. OAuth2. EU. Supplier ESG assessment and scorecard data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supply chain ESG. GDPR, CSRD. OAuth2. EU. Supplier sustainability and assessment data.
